scripts.start:developer: CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_BASE_URL=/ npm run prepare:developer && docusaurus start --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001
scripts.build:production: CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_BASE_URL=/content/ npm run prepare:production && docusaurus build --out-dir build/production
scripts.build:developer: CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3004 CORNERSTONE_CONTENT_SITE_BASE_URL=/ npm run prepare:developer && docusaurus build --out-dir build/developer
